EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn


  \* Each process runs the following
  \* process P(i) \in 1..N
  \* begin
  \*   state[i] := trying;
  \*   turn := i;
  \*   \* Wait until all other processes are not in critical section
  \*   \* Wait until turn == i
  \*   \* Wait until all other processes are not in critical section
  \*   state[i] := critical;
  \*   \* Critical section
  \*   state[i] := idle;
  \* end

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkOwned(i) == forks[i] = i
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                               /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i)
                               /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
                               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
                               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                               /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
                               /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
                               /\ forks' = forks
                               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "eating"
                               /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
                               /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
                               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
                               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
TypeOK == \A i \in 1..N : IF states[i] = "eating" THEN forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = i ELSE TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : 
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ LET maxNum == Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N}) IN
       /\ num[i] = maxNum + 1
       /\ flag[i] = TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
       /\ head \in 1..K
       /\ tail \in 1..K
       /\ count \in 0..K
       /\ q = <<>>
       /\ head = 1
       /\ tail = 1
       /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = <<>>
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == 
    \/ /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Follower"
    \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = <<>>
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
    \/ /\ state = "Leader"
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceil(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, topics, subscriptions, messages, delivered

CONSTANTS Subscriber, Topic, Message

Init ==
  /\ subscribers \subseteq Subscriber
  /\ topics \subseteq Topic
  /\ subscriptions \subseteq <<Subscriber, Topic>>
  /\ messages \subseteq <<Topic, Message>>
  /\ delivered \subseteq <<Subscriber, Topic, Message>>

Next ==
  /\ subscribers' \subseteq Subscriber
  /\ topics' \subseteq Topic
  /\ subscriptions' \subseteq <<Subscriber, Topic>>
  /\ messages' \subseteq <<Topic, Message>>
  /\ delivered' \subseteq <<Subscriber, Topic, Message>>

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, topics, subscriptions, messages, delivered>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}^2
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants
        /\ (turn = 0 /\ wants[0] = FALSE /\ wants[1] = FALSE) => /\ turn' = 0
        /\ (turn = 0 /\ wants[0] = FALSE /\ wants[1] = TRUE) => /\ turn' = 1
        /\ (turn = 0 /\ wants[0] = TRUE /\ wants[1] = FALSE) => /\ turn' = 0
        /\ (turn = 0 /\ wants[0] = TRUE /\ wants[1] = TRUE) => /\ turn' = 1
        /\ (turn = 1 /\ wants[0] = FALSE /\ wants[1] = FALSE) => /\ turn' = 1
        /\ (turn = 1 /\ wants[0] = FALSE /\ wants[1] = TRUE) => /\ turn' = 1
        /\ (turn = 1 /\ wants[0] = TRUE /\ wants[1] = FALSE) => /\ turn' = 0
        /\ (turn = 1 /\ wants[0] = TRUE /\ wants[1] = TRUE) => /\ turn' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in {0,1}^2

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
